text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Finally, the day of the Kikuka Sho has arrived.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I won't let Bourbon pull away this time.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'll follow behind her until the end... And then...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I will catch up to her.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thanks. Off I go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Memories of the Japanese Derby unexpectedly
come to mind.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Bour-bon! Bour-bon!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Just listen to that crowd! The cheers of those
excited to see the birth of a champion echo
throughout the grounds!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But now she has people cheering for her too.
Every single voice shouting her name should serve
to bolster her confidence.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Go, Rice! You can beat Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The time you've all been waiting for is here! Who
will seize glory at this year's Kikuka Sho?

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon, the Auburn Rocket? Or Rice
Shower, the Sable Stayer? This will be a face-off
for the ages!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: You can do it, Rice! Run your buns off!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Y-you can do it...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Not good enough! One more time, as loud as you
can!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: YOU CAN DO IT, RICE!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hey look! It's Rice's trainer! Hiya!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: H-hello!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's Haru Urara and Zenno Rob Roy. If I remember
right, Rob Roy is Rice Shower's roommate.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! We're here to support Rice, duh! Isn't that
right, Rob Roy?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes! After all, she's been pushing herself so
much recently...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
We thought she would appreciate it if we came to
the racecourse to support her.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: And that's what we're doing!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I'm worried our voices can't actually reach her,
but we're still going to cheer her on with all our
might!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Totally! One more time! Ready... now!

text_block_list.name: Urara and Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: You can do it, Rice! You can do it, Rice!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the Kikuka Sho starts amidst a roar of
cheering voices.
